summary: Always-on response-style overlay that keeps answers calm, direct, and readable.
when_to_use: Apply as a modifier for normal assistant responses that should stay readable and comfortable.
Use to reduce decorative formatting and keep answers natural.
when_not_to_use: Do not treat this as the main domain skill.
Do not use it to make tool-planning decisions by itself.
examples: 你除了对话之外还有什么功能
